# Albert K Studio

> Five-star rated luxury hair salon in Town Center Aventura, Florida. Master color,
> cuts, smoothing treatments, and premium extensions since 2009.

Albert K Studio specializes in dimensional blondes, lived-in balayage, color
correction, keratin smoothing, hair botox, precision cuts, blowouts, and
100% human-hair extensions. Every visit begins with a complimentary consultation.

- Location: 19020 NE 29th Ave, Aventura, FL 33180 (Town Center Aventura)
- Phone: (917) 657-8170
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 10AM–6PM
- Rating: 5.0 stars across 142+ Google reviews
- Serving: Aventura, Sunny Isles Beach, North Miami Beach, Golden Beach, Hallandale, Bal Harbour, Surfside, and greater Miami-Dade

## Pages
- [Home](https://albertkstudio.com/): Overview, featured work, and booking
- [About](https://albertkstudio.com/about): The studio's story and approach
- [Services](https://albertkstudio.com/services): Full service menu and pricing
- [Gallery](https://albertkstudio.com/gallery): Portfolio of color, cuts, and styling
- [Reviews](https://albertkstudio.com/reviews): Client testimonials
- [Contact](https://albertkstudio.com/contact): Address, hours, directions, and enquiry form
- [Book](https://albertkstudio.com/book): Request an appointment online

## Services
- Keratin Treatment — frizz-free, silky hair for weeks (from $350)
- Hair Botox — deep repair with a smooth, healthy finish (from $280)
- Haircuts & Color — precision cuts, dimensional blondes, balayage (from $150)
- Premium Extensions — tape-in and hand-tied, color-matched (from $450)

## Contact
To book, call (917) 657-8170 or request an appointment at https://albertkstudio.com/book
